---
title: "OpticalComponent"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Base class for ordered physical optical components on an optical path.

Aliases: `Comp`, `Component`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `optical_length` | float | Optical component length along the optical path in meters. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable component name. |
| `container` | [Cable](Cable.qmd) \| [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd) \| None | Optional physical container housing this optical component. |

## Contains

- [FiberSegment](FiberSegment.qmd)
- [Connector](Connector.qmd)
- [Splice](Splice.qmd)
- [Terminator](Terminator.qmd)

## Contained By

- [OpticalPath](OpticalPath.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

_None._
